properties.name: West Valley Fault (APPROXIMATE trace — REPLACE before publishing)
properties.note: Hand-digitized approximation of the WVF surface trace for pipeline development only. Before any public deployment, replace with the authoritative trace: (a) PHIVOLCS Valley Fault System atlas / HazardHunterPH export, or (b) GEM Global Active Faults Database (github.com/GEMScienceTools/gem-global-active-faults, Philippine Fault: Valley segment). Downstream distances change materially with trace accuracy near the fault.
